## Summary

Describe the change and the problem it solves.

## Related issue or specification

Link the relevant issue, specification, or ADR.

## Type of change

- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Specification or architecture
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Refactoring
- [ ] Security-related change
- [ ] Maintenance

## Validation

Describe how the change was verified. Include tests, acceptance criteria, or manual review steps.

## Security and privacy

- [ ] I considered security and privacy implications.
- [ ] This change contains no secrets, personal documents, or confidential data.
- [ ] New dependencies, file formats, or trust boundaries are documented.

## AI assistance

- [ ] No substantial AI assistance was used.
- [ ] Substantial AI assistance was used and reviewed under `AI_POLICY.md`.

Describe material AI assistance when applicable:

## Checklist

- [ ] The change has a clear and limited scope.
- [ ] I can explain and take responsibility for the complete change.
- [ ] Documentation is updated.
- [ ] Tests or acceptance criteria are included, or I explained why they are not applicable.
- [ ] Breaking changes are identified.
- [ ] Licensing and provenance have been checked.
- [ ] The changelog is updated when appropriate.
